name: Web → Parse → AI Agent (LLM + Tool) → Formatted Report

string.name: prompt
string.value:
You are analyzing a scraped list of links.

Input JSON:
{{JSON.stringify($json, null, 2)}}

Tasks:
1) Identify 3–5 themes across the list.
2) Select the top 5 items worth reading (justify briefly).
3) If you need more context on an item, use the HTTP tool to fetch the article URL (limit: fetch at most 3 URLs).
4) Output a Markdown report with:
   - Executive summary (3–6 bullets)
   - Themes
   - Table: Rank | Title | Why it matters | URL
   - Risks/Notes (rate limits, scrape fragility, etc.)

Constraints:
- Prefer deterministic, verifiable statements.
- If a URL is a HN internal item or requires JS, note limitations.

parameters.systemMessage: You are a technical analyst. Produce concise, structured Markdown. Use tools only when needed. Do not fabricate details—if unknown, say so.

parameters.description: Fetch a URL for more context (GET).
